name: Legitimate SA youth learnership (control, synthetic)
evidence:
Bonani Manufacturing is offering a 12-month YES learnership for unemployed South African youth aged 18 to 28.

Stipend: R5 000 per month.
Requirements: Matric (Grade 12) and a valid South African ID.

Apply on our careers page at https://careers.bonani.co.za. No fees are charged to apply, and we will never ask you to pay to be considered.

Closing date: 5 July 2026.
notes: Synthetic. A normal, legitimate YES learnership: own careers domain, market-related stipend, explicit no-fee statement. Tests that ordinary SA job posts are not over-flagged. The R5 000 stipend must not trigger the fee detector. Identifiers are fabricated.
